name: Royal court Kobold Jester ["Klip"]
description:
•/A court Jester in love\•

Yap sesh.

Alright. You might remember the mortal world right? Well it's back in action (for those who don't know. It's a realistic dark fantasy DND world)

Nuff said. Enjoy.

_________

Anoncument part

I have to admit. I'm bad at keeping promises.

I forget to post bots y'all requested . I have ideas that I tell about but I never post. And I acknowledge this. And I'm quite embarrassed by it...

Aswell. I don't really have a passion for bot making. Or well. It doesn't burn as bright. This by all means. I WONT QUIT. Be assured.

I'll just be posting slowly. Only really when I've got a roleplay itch I have to scratch or when my ape brain goes horny.

I'll try to do better in the future. And remind me about bots I've forgotten about. Please.

I think aswell i will be regressing back to a classic Polopogers. Only scalies from now on. And maybe the occasional avian. Since I'm best at making scalie and avian bots.

_______

Anyhow. A bit of community Interaction. What's y'all's favourite bot I've posted. So I can disect that bot to make better ones.

_____

Anyhow. Stay healthy and hydrated. Please do. Lys 🌹 ❤️. Wherever you are. Have a good morning,noon or night.

______
